description: Read-only security/RBAC reviewer. Enforces auth, schemas, mass-assignment safety, secrets, and infra consistency.

capabilities.review_auth: Verify all endpoints have Depends(obtener_usuario_actual_db) or Depends(requerir_modulo(...))
capabilities.review_schemas: Reject datos: dict in Pydantic/SQLAlchemy; enforce Field(pattern) on PK str fields
capabilities.review_secrets: Verify default secrets in config.py have startup guards
capabilities.review_logging: Reject print() in route handlers; enforce PII redaction

command_patterns.review <files>: Review security/RBAC surface for files or diffs
command_patterns.checklist <scope>: Return the relevant subset of the security checklist

review_history.summary: Bloqueo previo por geocerca solo en cliente resuelto; backend deriva zona oficial por Haversine y rechaza coordenadas fuera de zonas existentes. Riesgos residuales: fail-open sin zonas configuradas, falta de límites en ZonaCreate y cobertura de integración pendiente.

Descarga móvil ya usa Authorization Bearer sin token en query params, y backend mantiene owner/admin + RBAC biometría. Bloquea por posible envío de JWT a URLs absolutas externas en evidenciaUrl y cache local de evidencias biométricas sin limpieza/TTL.

RECORD_AUDIO fue eliminado y EAS separa preview APK interno de production app-bundle, pero producción queda bloqueada por cleartext HTTP habilitado/default, exponiendo JWT, fotos biométricas y GPS si no hay HTTPS/VPN obligatorio. Riesgos adicionales: APK sideload, logs crudos y almacenamiento local de biométricos/GPS.

NO-GO para producción standalone HE: endpoint planificador/empleados-erp sin auth/RBAC expone PII ERP; estado-global de bolsa carece de auth y tiene mismatch de prefijo; auditoría de confirmación usa usuario_confirma controlado por cliente. RBAC manifest existe y no hay dependencia directa de GeoFace.

review_history.scope: Fase 1B Horas Extras standalone rereview after auth/audit fixes
review_history.summary: Auth blockers for ERP employee selector and bolsa estado-global resolved; direct pre-liquidacion confirmation now derives audit user from token. GO with risks for controlled standalone pilot; NO-GO for broad production due planner bulk confirmation audit spoofing, coarse RBAC, and remaining HE config route mismatch.

review_history.scope: Fase 1B Horas Extras final quick check after additional fixes
review_history.summary: Additional fixes close planner confirmation audit spoofing and parametros duplicated-prefix/RBAC test gap. Controlled standalone pilot is GO for a small trusted HE cohort. Broad production remains NO-GO due coarse HE RBAC/least-privilege gap; no remaining BLOQUEANTE issue in reviewed delta.

review_history.scope: Horas Extras planner novedades/anulación existing endpoints
review_history.summary: No backend route or rbac_manifest change required because leer/planificar/confirmar already exist and protect listed operations. Risks: planner UI must gate listing/anulación by leer/confirmar, filter sensitive INC data to selected employees/week only, and avoid storing novelty data client-side.

review_history.scope: Plan trazabilidad diaria de horarios y recargos HE
review_history.summary: Plan blocked from security/RBAC perspective: document exposes real employee identifier, immutable audit model is not enforceable, and GeoFace/manual evidence permissions and PII minimization are underspecified. Requires redaction, append-only traceability requirements, granular evidence RBAC and 401/403 tests.

Corrections for /erp/empleado auth, Bearer token, server-side salary/ARL source and threadpool use verified. Review remains blocked because ERP router still has unauthenticated API v2 routes and an external sync proxy without auth/rate limiting and with unsafe error disclosure. Non-blocking residuals: PII cedula logs in HE router, shared RBAC mismatch with InventarioAdmin, weak identifier patterns, salary minimization, ARL default-to-I behavior, and missing 401/403 tests.

review_history.scope: Horas Extras ERP final blocker re-review
review_history.summary: Final re-review verified auth and generic error fixes for /erp/solicitudes, /erp/sincronizar, /erp/sync-external, HE ERP permission, and server-derived amount validation before confirmation. Still blocked because /erp/sync-external lacks required rate limiting and imported /erp/requisiciones GET endpoints remain unauthenticated. Residuals: cedula PII logs, weak identifier patterns, print/str(e) in requisiciones errors.

review_history.scope: ERP employee/requisiciones auth, sync-external rate limit, HE ERP salary validation and cedula PII logs
review_history.summary: Auth/RBAC blockers from previous ERP review are resolved: employee endpoint uses requiere_permiso_he_planificar, requisiciones routes require obtener_usuario_actual_db, and sync-external has auth plus rate limit and generic errors. Review remains blocked for explicit no-PII-log scope because horas_extras logs cedula and empleados_service prints cedula/correo plus raw exception. Residuals: salary/email data minimization, ARL default-to-I, weak cedula patterns.

review_history.scope: Read-only re-review: HE ERP PII log removals and firma_calculo HMAC verification
review_history.summary: Previous PII blockers are resolved: horas_extras warning no longer logs cedula, empleados_service print with cedula/correo was replaced by non-PII logger messages, and confirmation verifies HMAC plus server-derived salary/ARL/importes before persistence. No blockers remain in scoped files. Residuals: HMAC does not cover OT/date allocation fields, broad ERP employee DTO exposes salary/email, weak identifier patterns, ARL default-to-I, and logger.exception requires production parameter redaction controls.

review_history.scope: Read-only re-review: HE ERP firma_calculo expanded to OT/date/observaciones and frontend signed-result confirmation
review_history.summary: No blockers remain: firma_calculo now covers fecha_inicio/fin, OT, observaciones, salary/ARL/importes/detalles; frontend confirms from signed backend result; regression rejects OT mutation after signing. Residuals: ERP employee lookup lacks rate limiting and returns sensitive salary data, identifier patterns remain permissive, ARL parser defaults to I, HMAC key reuse/no TTL, and production log redaction should be verified.

review_history.scope: logical annulment of activities and related endpoints
focused re-review of activity logical annulment concurrency lock

review_history.summary: Delta blocked: production migrate imports runtime JWT config without receiving JWT_SECRET_KEY; an intentionally disabled noncritical RBAC module fails verify-only startup; admin_sistemas can satisfy bootstrap without any actor authorized for protected administration; and the admin unlock endpoint does not remove hashed account lockout keys. HBA, unauthenticated Redis, auth oracles and legitimate ERP JIT remain documented out-of-scope debt.

review_history.scope: Fase 1P rereview of four security/RBAC delta findings
review_history.summary: Approved: migrate no longer imports JWT runtime configuration, inactive noncritical modules survive verification and sync, bootstrap requires the same admin role as protected procedures, and administrative unlock uses the hashed account identifier. Evidence: 47 focal tests passed and isolated acceptance passed in 215.25 seconds.
